title: Sitecore OrderCloud Order
description: Schema representing an order in the Sitecore OrderCloud commerce platform. Orders capture the full lifecycle of a purchase transaction from creation through fulfillment, including line items, payment, shipping, and promotions.

ID.description: The unique identifier of the order, either system-generated or provided at creation

FromUser.description: The user who created or owns the order

FromUserID.description: The identifier of the user who placed the order

BillingAddressID.description: The identifier of the billing address for this order

BillingAddress.description: The billing address details for this order

ShippingAddressID.description: The identifier of the shipping address for this order

Comments.description: Free-form comments attached to the order by the buyer or administrator

LineItemCount.description: The total number of distinct line items in this order

Status.description: The current workflow status of the order

DateCreated.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was first created

DateSubmitted.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was submitted for fulfillment

DateApproved.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was approved (for orders requiring approval)

DateDeclined.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was declined by an approver

DateCanceled.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was canceled

DateCompleted.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was fulfilled and marked complete

Subtotal.description: The order subtotal calculated from line item prices before promotions, shipping, and tax

ShippingCost.description: The total shipping cost applied to the order

TaxCost.description: The total tax amount calculated for the order

PromotionDiscount.description: The total discount amount subtracted from the order by applied promotions

Total.description: The final order total after adding shipping, tax, and subtracting promotions

IsSubmitted.description: Whether the order has been submitted for fulfillment

xp.description: Extended properties for storing custom order-level attributes not covered by the standard schema

LineItem.description: A product line item within an OrderCloud order

ID.description: The unique identifier of this line item within the order

ProductID.description: The identifier of the product being purchased in this line item

Quantity.description: The number of units being purchased for this product

DateAdded.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when this line item was added to the order

QuantityShipped.description: The number of units that have been shipped for this line item

UnitPrice.description: The price per unit for this product at the time of ordering

PromotionDiscount.description: The promotional discount applied to this specific line item

LineTotal.description: The total price for this line item (unit price multiplied by quantity, minus discounts)

LineSubtotal.description: The subtotal for this line item before promotions and discounts

ShippingAddressID.description: The shipping address identifier for this specific line item, overrides the order-level address

Product.description: Snapshot of product details at the time the line item was added

Specs.description: Spec option selections that identify the specific product variant

xp.description: Extended properties for custom line item attributes

LineItemProduct.description: A snapshot of product information captured at the time a line item was added

ShipWeight.description: The shipping weight of the product

xp.description: Extended properties for custom product attributes

LineItemSpec.description: A spec option selection defining which product variant is in the line item

SpecID.description: The identifier of the spec (e.g., Color, Size)

OptionID.description: The identifier of the selected spec option value

Value.description: The display value of the selected spec option

Payment.description: A payment record associated with an order

ID.description: The unique identifier of this payment

Type.description: The type of payment instrument used

CreditCardID.description: The identifier of the credit card used (for CreditCard type payments)

SpendingAccountID.description: The identifier of the spending account used

Amount.description: The payment amount in the order currency

Accepted.description: Whether the payment has been accepted

xp.description: Extended properties for custom payment attributes

Address.description: A shipping or billing address for an order

ID.description: The unique identifier of the address record

FirstName.description: The recipient's first name at this address

LastName.description: The recipient's last name at this address

Company.description: The company name at this address

Street2.description: The secondary street address line (suite, apartment, etc.)

State.description: The state, province, or region code

Phone.description: The phone number at this address

xp.description: Extended properties for custom address attributes

UserReference.description: A reference to the user who placed or owns the order

ID.description: The unique identifier of the user
